name: perplexity-search
description: Answer-first web search: the Sonar models answer a query directly from live web results and return the cited sources. Best when you want a synthesized answer with citations, not just links. API key from perplexity.ai.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Perplexity API Key
x-meta.help: Your Perplexity API key (perplexity.ai). Leave empty to fall back to the PERPLEXITY_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Request Timeout
x-meta.help: Maximum seconds to wait for a Sonar response (answer synthesis can take longer than a plain search).
